items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Coupon performance tracking' but did not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The evidence provided lacks specific details or endpoints that demonstrate how coupon performance is tracked, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage. Without this critical information, it is impossible to assert whether the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
